results.title: Steven Greulich
highlights:
AI Solutions Architect @ PSEG
...
AI Solutions Architect at [PSEG](https://www.linkedin.com/company/pseg)
...
As a Software Engineer at PSEG with over six years of experience, the focus has been on developing innovative mobile and serverless applications to enhance system performance and user experience. The team successfully launched an offline-capable Generative Adversarial Network proof of concept and deployed mobile apps on major platforms using React Native, showcasing expertise in modern front-end frameworks and cross-platform architecture. By leveraging AWS services, including API Gateway and Lambda, the team integrated mobile solutions with legacy systems, demonstrating proficiency in cloud computing and serverless architectures. Additionally, implementing a feature flag system significantly improved app stability, reducing rollback times and supporting seamless deployments. Motivated by a passion for creating impactful solutions, the work consistently aligns with PSEG's mission to drive efficiency and innovation.

...
Work Location Category: Hybrid
...
#### Job Summary
...
Corporate I&C/ Digital Design engineer for Salem and Hope Creek is responsible to providing support for all Digital and I&C design basis activities assigned to them in support of the safe and efficient operation of the Generating Stations. Represents, leads, develops overall strategies and influences decision-making for performance of the assigned design discipline. Provides support for routine design assessments, outage readiness and preparation for outside organizational assessments (i.e. INPO).
...
The Design Engineers job responsibilities include: configuration changes, setpoint calculations, engineering evaluations, Corrective Action Program, Equipment Qualification, support shift coverage for refueling outages, support license change requests, support plant engineering emergent design related requests, 50.59 preparation/reviews and technical evaluations.
...
The successful individual will be able to fulfill an LRE (lead responsible engineer) role for configuration changes and capital projects. These responsibilities include:
...
The successful candidate will also perform other assigned duties as determined by the I&C/ Digital Design Engineering Branch Manager. Technical proficiency is desired in the area of Instrumentation and Controls (Digital Systems, setpoint, scaling, etc.).
...
#### Job Specific Qualifications
...
BS Degree in Electrical Engineering or Computer Engineering or related Technical Degree.
...
Minimum of 5 years experience in the nuclear industry or related experience. Availability for Shift Work during plant outages and generation challenges.
...
Current experience and expertise in performing digital changes at Nuclear Power Plants. Must meet Nuclear’s requirements for Unescorted Plant Access.
...
Experience in Nuclear Power Plant Engineering. Experience preparing nuclear digital modifications; ability to manage projects and /or external vendors, familiar with IEEE/ISO/ISA/EPRI/Digital. standards and NRC regulations/guidance (Reg Guide, ISG) related to design function for PWR/BWR. Knowledge of setpoint calculations, the Equipment Qualification program and Cyber Security. Engagement with nuclear digital industry groups

I'm super excited to announce that I'll be joining PSEG this summer as a Technical Engineering Intern at the Hope Creek & Salem Nuclear Generating Stations! 

I'm incredibly grateful for the opportunity to apply my problem-solving, analytical, and engineering skills within the energy industry while continuing to learn from such talented professionals. results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...

#### Senior Data Engineer
...
As the Production Support Data Lake Manager for PSEG's Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI), I proudly hold the position of AMI Data Lake Production Support Manager as a Data Engineer. My responsibilities extend to overseeing the seamless operation of the AMI Data Lake, ensuring its optimal performance. In addition to my role in production support, I actively contribute to data engineering tasks, leveraging a robust skill set in data modeling, ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes, and data pipeline optimization. These data engineering skills play a vital role in enhancing the efficiency of our data processing systems, aligning with my dedication to maintaining high standards of performance and reliability in our technological landscape. Furthermore, I played a crucial role in building the backend Power BI infrastructure, focusing on streamlining report publishing processes. Excited about the dynamic challenges and opportunities within the Advanced Metering Infrastructure, I bring a blend of production support and data engineering expertise at PSEG.

Staff Engineer at [PSEG](https://www.linkedin.com/company/pseg)

I am a Engineer at PSE&G. I graduated from New Jersey Institute of Technology with a Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering with a minor in Business. As an engineer in the Project Origination team, I find satisfaction in working in a team environment and being challenged with new projects. My experience has taught me to always have an open mind, be inclusive of everyone's thoughts and to enjoy learning new skills from fellow coworkers. Outside of work, I enjoy hiking, baking and spending time with my family.
...
Engineer (Current)
...
- Maintain strong relationships with all key stakeholders and vendors by facilitating project execution meetings. During my time as an engineer at PSE&G, I have been working on three company initiatives: Implementing BIM company-wide: Research how we can optimize our current design, construction and asset management processes by utilizing BIM technology. Some of my responsibilities are to:

- Develop internal BIM guidelines to ensure consistent engineering deliverables throughout the life cycle of a project Implementing utility-wide rotational program: Part of a team responsible for creating a utility wide rotational program that allows for new engineers to gain a well-rounded understanding of all the different departments within PSE&G and build bench strength for future leadership positions. Develop a PSE&G- Electric Delivery Asset Book: Lead in developing a PSE&G-Electric Delivery Asset Book and an internal stakeholder presentation that encompasses all the groups, functions, assets, etc. that make up the PSE&G electric department. highlights:
Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195 | Wfh
...
# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195
...
- Meet HII's Mission Technologies Division
- Our team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 9 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 7 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 4 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in realted field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 13 years relevant experience.
...
- Programming languages: Python
...
- Containerized development and deployment: Docker, Rancher, and/or K8s.
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
...
- Hands-on experience with current open-source LLMs and ecosystem tools (e.g., model serving, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, embeddings).
- Experience developing generative AI products or platforms, including multimodal use cases (e.g., text, vision, audio, document understanding).
...
- Bachelors in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or equivalent technologies/experience.
- Experience with:
...
- UI/UX development: JavaScript (Angular, React).

### SmartFlow AI
...
Developing SmartFlow Ledger, an end-to-end AI data ingestion pipeline using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker. The system processes financial documents via OCR, uses LLMs for structured extraction, and applies validation layers before persisting records, enabling scalable and reliable financial data processing
...
### LoL-AI-Matchup-Predictor
...
This AI project leverages third-party APIs such as Riot Games API and web scraping techniques to extract extensive champion statistics that are key to developing an accurate AI model from League of Legends. All these data will then be organized and preprocessed in the Jupyter notebooks and fed into various AI models, including XGBoost, Random Forest, and Neural Networks, to predict match outcomes based on champion selections and other relevant features. The trained AI models are then integrated into a Flask web application, providing users with match predictions and easy access to player and champion data for personal or experimental purposes.
